messages: Hi omar , Im booking on behalf of my reltive Dr.Amer Mechria , he will be arriving on sunday 15th march with his family (early check in is highly appreciated) let me know what paperwork you might need to ensure their smooth check in , thanks in advance dear
We will also need another apartment also in silverpalm for his mother and brother that will stay for 3 nights only , so let me know if you have another apartment for rent there
Sure thing
Lets wrap up the first unit then get to the other one as well
Mr amer's wife is still managing her flight so i will get back to you with her passport if she confirms the flight
Thats for the first apartment
Now lets get to the other apartment that shall be also arriving 15th march and check out on 18th march total 3 nights i need it to be 2 bedrooms only so let me see what you list
Its urgently needed to book the other apartment asap and i dont want to deal with more than a company so please be responsive , apologizes if its causing any pressure
Also will there be anybody there to welcome them upon arrival ?
The second apartment is 2 bedroom for 2 persons
All in silverpalm?
I sent you the passports for the second apartment in its chat let me know if you need anything else , also will there be anyone to assist them upon their arrival
Ok and for faster communication lets chat over whatsapp 01125485814 to ensure smooth experience
Check ur whatsapp

Family of 4 
Short stay in Cairo

Hello
Plz confirm that night check in possible

Thank you 
We arrive in Cairo airport around 7pm so it will be a late check in . 
We will need late access to the apartment
Thanks we will checkout 5.30
Thanks 🙏🏻
Hello.. not really didn’t see any remote except the tv remote
Hello omar can i do check in at 5am or 6am today
Its ok can you connect me with them
And i need to know how much is the cost of the early check in
Ok all good
Hello omar no one contacted me
Egyptian
Ok we can do normal check in
1 its only me

Hallo Omar ! Es freut mich sehr dass es geklappt hat! Wir werden erst gegen 20/20.30 anreisen - ich lande 19.15 in Cairo ! Wäre es möglich das Apartment am abreisetag gegen 12.30/13 Uhr zu verlassen da mein Flug um 17 Uhr geht ? Vielen lieben Dank für das entgegenkommen! Ich freue mich sehr wieder bald zurück in Cairo zu sein

Hello Omar ! I came to Cairo - now the 3rd time to visit the city again and a colleague who will stay with me and show me around again !we are happy to stay in this beautiful apartment for the time I will be there ! Thank u for accepting
Hallo ?
Hallo ! In 3 Tagen kommen wir und freuen uns ! Die Adresse / türcode/ wlan Passwort schickst du dann bald ?! Klappt es dass wir am 8.3 um 13 Uhr gehen können? Bis bald Rüdiger
Alles klar
Danke
Alles klar
Guten Morgen! Mein Flug landet um 19.15 in Cairo- ich denke wir werden gegen 20.30 einchecken
Habe es per WhatsApp gesendet
Hallo Omar Check in ist Mittwoch 5.3 ! Danke für die Information ! Passkopien sende ich dir !
Danke

Hallo Omar ! Ich werde am 24.-26.11 na h Kairo kommen und hätte sehr gerne dein Apartment wieder gebucht, jedoch geht dies erst ab 3 Nächte 🥲 hast du ein anderes Apartment in Silber Palms evtl was zu buchen wäre? Herzliche Grüße Rüdiger
24. bis 26 November 2025
2 Schlafzimmer
Vielen lieben Dank! Das ist im gleichen komplex wie da wo ich das letzte Mal war oder?
Super ! Vielen lieben Dank! Ich werde es bald buchen
